occupation_definition: Assist faculty or other instructional staff in postsecondary institutions by performing instructional support activities, such as developing teaching materials, leading discussion groups, preparing and giving examinations, and grading examinations or papers. Graduate students who teach one or more full courses should be classified in the 25-1000 minor group.

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Other Educational Instruction and Library Occupations

siblings.occupation_title: Teaching Assistants, Preschool, Elementary, Middle, and Secondary School, Except Special Education
